text.title: Build vs Buy Decision Tree Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the decision-tree-build-vs-buy methodology end-to-end.

step.name: draft-charter
step.action: Capability charter: what it does, who uses it, why now.

step.name: score-axes
step.decision-gate: If one option is unscored (only 1 candidate), expand the candidate set.

step.name: walk-tree
step.action: Apply the tree: strategic_differentiation ≥4 → build; <3 → buy/adopt-oss; tie → lower TCO with acceptable lock-in.

step.name: tag-reversibility
step.action: Apply adr-reversibility-tagging; buy choices with lock-in usually one_way_door_costly.
step.decision-gate: If lock-in is irrevocable (e.g., vendor exclusive contract), escalate to founder sign-off + 48h cool-off.
